summary: Session 4 (Sonstiges/Misc Shopping List) testing: backend 12/12 PASS (6 new misc-mode tests + 6 grocery regression). Frontend verified end-to-end on mobile viewport: segmented control (Nahrungsmittel/Sonstiges), localStorage persistence, predefined tag picker with all 6 stores, custom-tag flow, mode-aware Brain Dump (Non-Food placeholder, KI-Parse calls /api/brain-dump/parse with mode='misc' and returns correct location_tag mapping: Ibuprofen→Apotheke, Schrauben→Baumarkt, Zahnpasta→Drogerie), misc preview rows expose only location dropdown (no qty/unit/category), shopping-mode-toggle correctly hidden on Sonstiges sub-tab, bottom-nav shopping-badge shows single number when only grocery has items. Grocery regression untouched.

integration_issues.flow: Add misc item / Save misc brain-dump items
integration_issues.issue: Supabase 'misc_items' table does not exist yet → INSERT silently fails (404 in console, no UI toast). EXPECTED per spec — user must run /app/supabase_misc_setup.sql. Recommend a non-blocking error toast as future enhancement.

passing_backend_tests: POST /api/brain-dump/parse without mode → returns mode='grocery' with grocery schema (backwards compat)
POST /api/brain-dump/parse with mode='grocery' → grocery schema, no location_tag

POST /api/brain-dump/parse with mode='misc' input '6 mixed items' → 6 items with valid location_tag in whitelist {Apotheke, Baumarkt, Drogerie, Zoohandlung, Kleidung, Sonstiges}; no quantity/unit/category fields
Rate limit shared across modes: 5 grocery + 5 misc succeed; 11th call → 429 with Retry-After header
passing_frontend_tests: Login as Tim → Shopping tab loads → segmented control 'Nahrungsmittel'/'Sonstiges' visible (data-testid=subtab-grocery / subtab-sonstiges)
Default sub-tab = 'grocery' (aria-selected=true), grocery badge '3' shown on segmented control
Switch to Sonstiges → aria-selected=true, shopping-mode-toggle disappears (count 1→0), AddMiscItemInput + tag selector render
localStorage 'shopping-subtab' set to 'sonstiges' after switch (verified via page.evaluate)
Tag picker opens with all 6 predefined tags (apotheke/baumarkt/drogerie/zoohandlung/kleidung/sonstiges) + 'Eigener Tag' toggle
Selecting 'Apotheke' updates selector pill to '💊 Apotheke'
Custom tag flow: click '+ Eigener Tag' → input shows → fill 'Buchhandlung' → click 'Ok' → selector becomes '🏷️ Buchhandlung'

Brain Dump on Sonstiges: data-testid=brain-dump-toggle-misc expands → misc placeholder 'z.B. Ibuprofen, Schrauben 4mm, Hundefutter Nassfutter, Zahnpasta, Batterien AA…' + 'Non-Food in Artikel umwandeln' subtitle

KI-Parse with 'Ibuprofen, Schrauben 4mm, Zahnpasta' returns 3 preview rows in ~6s. Each row shows ONLY location dropdown (data-testid=brain-dump-preview-location) — no qty/unit/category fields. Mapping verified: Ibuprofen→Apotheke, Schrauben→Baumarkt (note '4mm'), Zahnpasta→Drogerie
Bottom-nav shopping-badge correctly shows '3' (single number) when only grocery has items (split 'N·M' format only triggers when both >0 — could not test split because misc_items table missing)
Empty Sonstiges list shows EmptyState 'Noch nichts gesammelt' with correct copy
untestable_due_to_missing_table: Persistence of misc items (404 from Supabase)
Split badge 'N·M' format on bottom-nav (requires misc count > 0)
Sticky tag headers on misc list
action_items: USER must run /app/supabase_misc_setup.sql in Supabase SQL editor to create 'misc_items' table with RLS — once done, persistence + split badge + grouping should be re-tested.
[Optional UX enhancement] Surface a toast/banner when misc INSERT fails with 404 (currently silent — easy to miss for users).

[Optional regression observed but pre-existing] After full page reload, app gets stuck on 'Loading…' if 'Stay logged in' not toggled — auth lost. This is a previous-session feature behavior, not new to Session 4.
critical_code_review_comments: Brain dump testid naming convention slightly inconsistent: grocery uses 'brain-dump-toggle' / 'brain-dump-parse-button' while misc uses '-misc' suffix. Acceptable, but worth documenting.
Server.py BRAIN_DUMP_SYSTEM_PROMPT_MISC heuristics map 'Batterien AA' → 'Sonstiges' (per the example in the prompt). Test confirmed Claude follows this. Good.
MiscContext.softDelete fires actual delete after 5s; no error handling if Supabase delete fails (silent). Same pattern as GroceryContext, low priority.
BottomNav uses middle-dot \u00B7 between counts — visually clean; spec called this out and it's implemented correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows; ~50% of misc flows blocked by missing Supabase table

seed_data_creation: None (existing 3 grocery items from previous iteration still present). Attempted to add misc 'Testpflaster' but Supabase returned 404 (table missing) — no data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend brain-dump endpoint fully validated for both modes; rate limit shared correctly. Frontend UI fully wired and rendering correctly. ONLY blocker is misc_items Supabase table — once user runs /app/supabase_misc_setup.sql, re-run frontend tests to validate: persistence, sticky tag-group headers, MiscItemRow swipe/toggle/undo, split badge 'N·M' on bottom-nav, sub-tab-aware 'Liste leeren', and misc grouping order. Use /app/backend/tests/test_brain_dump_misc.py and test_brain_dump.py for backend regression. Brain dump misc parse button has testid 'brain-dump-parse-button-misc' (not 'brain-dump-parse').
rca_of_issue: No bugs in code. Single environment dependency: misc_items table not yet provisioned in Supabase (intentional — user task per spec).
